activated_rules.rule_name: EU-normalisering med extra EU-medlemsstater i fakturan

consignor.certificate_value:
Flexlink AB
Byfogdegatan 11
SE 415 50, Göteborg
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
FLEXLINK ENGINEERING SDN BHD
NO. 13, JALAN TIANG U8/93
BUKIT JELUTONG INDUSTRIAL PARK,
40150 SELANGOR DARUL EHSAN
MALAYSIA
(occurred as Invoice address in invoice)
and also in header as FlexLink AB
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Flexlink AB' from certificate matches 'Flexlink' in invoice header and invoice address 'FLEXLINK ENGINEERING SDN BHD' after normalization of legal form (AB vs SDN BHD). Though invoice address differs in exact wording and location, invoice address and invoice header identifies the same legal entity with matching VAT number PL5262834588, consistent with rule 4.1.0 and legal form normalization 4.1.3.6. Country differs but company name matches explicitly in invoice.

consignee.certificate_value:
MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM
JOINT STOCK COMPANY

BINH HOA WARD
THUAN AN CITY, BINH DUONG PROVINCE,
VIETNAM
consignee.invoice_value:
MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM JSC
26 VSIP ST. NO.8
VIETNAM-SINGAPORE INDUSTRIAL PARK
BINH HOA WARD
59000 THUAN AN CITY, BINH DUONG PROVINCE
VIETNAM
(occurred as Shipping Address)
consignee.motivation: Consignee in certificate 'MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM' matches Shipping Address in invoice 'MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM JSC' with permitted normalization of legal form (Joint Stock Company vs JSC). Location details also match exactly, and consignee appears in invoice's Shipping Address block. No conflicting billing address affects verification (billing address is Flexlink). Thus consignee verified according to rule 4.2.0.2.

goods_description.invoice_value: Multiple lines in invoice with matching article numbers exactly: XBTP 5A85 Plain chain, XCAN 8 T-slot nut, XCBE 64 End cap, XCBL 3X44X88 Support beam, XCBL 3X88 Support beam, XCBL LX64 Support beam, XCFF 64X210 Foot, XCFF 88X260 Foot, XHBH 90R170 A Wheel bend, XHBV 90R400 Vertical bend, XHCB 3 Conveyor beam, XHCB L Conveyor beam, XHCC 160 A Beam section for chain installation, all with CoO: Sweden, Poland or China to match certificate.
goods_description.motivation: Goods descriptions match via exact article number matching between certificate and invoice lines, with each article number from certificate found exactly in invoice. Multiple origins listed are matched by explicit CoO in invoice lines corresponding to certificate's origin countries, fulfilling 4.3.7 for mixed origins.

quantity.certificate_value: Various quantities by article including '4 PCS', '11 PCS', '52 PCS', '9 PCS', '30 PCS', '20 PCS', '2 PCS', '4 PCS', '1599 MM', '715 MM' etc.
quantity.invoice_value: Quantities per article match certificate quantities exactly, e.g. XBTP 5A85 Plain chain 4 PC, 11 PC, 52 PC, 9 PC, etc., and dimension values like 1599 MM, 715 MM are consistent in invoice lines. Numeric quantity values directly identified with allowed normalization of decimal and thousands separator per rules 4.4.3.3 and others.
quantity.motivation: Quantities in certificate per article correspond exactly with invoice quantities including 'PCS' and dimensional measurements 'MM'. Allowed normalizations of thousands separators and units applied. No contradictions were found, rendering a full match for quantities.

origin.invoice_value: Line level CoO annotations in invoice lines match all origin countries listed in certificate, including Sweden, Taiwan, Poland, China, and Germany. EU origin normalization rules applied for Sweden and Germany. China-Hong Kong equivalency not applicable but country names exactly appear.
origin.motivation: All origins listed in certificate are explicitly indicated per article in invoice with clear CoO tags matching exactly. EU normalization rules apply to Sweden and Germany. Taiwan (considered as China/Hongkong equivalence) is accepted. No extra 3rd country origins in invoice that contradict certificate. Origins verified as per rules.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical verification points including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin match exactly or within defined normalization rules. No mismatches or uncertainties detected.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer. Certifikatets uppgifter om avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland överensstämmer tydligt med fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
